title: Tilray Stock's High Is Fading — Cannabis Bulls Aren't Buzzing Over The Beer Pivot
text: Tilray stock's high is fading as cannabis-focused investors express skepticism about the company's beer pivot. Retail investors frustrated with the flow of brewery and beverage announcements, particularly after U.S. government moved marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III. The company's diversification into craft beer and beverages through strategic acquisitions has been viewed with mixed sentiment among cannabis-focused retail investors who expected the company to focus exclusively on cannabis opportunities.
